//: Render-diff scene manifest. See README.md for the mode ladder.
//canvas: CSS selector screenshots are clipped to. The page chrome differs
//canvas2: by backend on purpose (the header badge reads WEBGL vs WEBGPU),
//canvas3: so a full-page diff would always fail. Clip to the canvas.

scenes.note: The #570 WGSL triangle probe. Static, so tolerance is tight. Mode is 'self' because the WebGL path renders the whole engine here, not a triangle -- there is no comparable reference until PR4 registers scene_renderer on the WebGPU path. WebGPU is the page default now, so webgl_query pins the baseline shot to ?renderer=webgl explicitly rather than relying on an unparented default.
